name: cmm-pm-skills
description: CMM 自研产品经理工作流。端到端流水线 ①市场→②洞察→③战略→④PRD→⑤设计→⑥技术方案→⑦故事→⑧测试→⑩上线→⑪数据；统一纪律见 CONVENTIONS.md。

plugins.name: pm-product-discovery
plugins.description: Product discovery skills for PMs: ideation, experiments, assumption testing, feature prioritization, and customer interview synthesis.

plugins.name: pm-product-strategy
plugins.description: Product strategy skills for PMs: vision, strategy canvas, value propositions, lean canvas, business model canvas, SWOT, PESTLE, Ansoff Matrix, Porter's Five Forces, and monetization.

plugins.name: pm-execution
plugins.description: Execution and product management skills: PRDs, OKRs, roadmaps, sprints, pre-mortems, stakeholder maps, user stories, prioritization frameworks, and more.

plugins.name: pm-market-research
plugins.description: Market research skills for PMs: user personas, market segmentation, sentiment analysis, and competitive analysis.

plugins.name: pm-data-analytics
plugins.description: Data analytics skills for PMs: SQL query generation and cohort analysis. Analyze user data, generate queries, and identify retention patterns.

plugins.name: pm-go-to-market
plugins.description: Go-to-market skills for PMs: GTM strategy, growth loops, GTM motions, beachhead segments, and ideal customer profiles.

plugins.name: pm-marketing-growth
plugins.description: Product marketing and growth skills: marketing ideas, value proposition statements, North Star metrics, product naming, and positioning.

plugins.name: pm-toolkit
plugins.description: PM utility skills: resume review, NDA drafting, privacy policy generation, and grammar/flow checking. Essential tools for product managers beyond core product work.

plugins.name: pm-ai-shipping
plugins.description: AI Shipping Kit — for PMs and founders accountable for AI-built code. Document a vibe-coded app, audit it for intended-vs-implemented security gaps and performance issues, and produce a reviewer-ready shipping packet.
